title: Red Hat Security Advisory: osbuild-composer security update
overview:
An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: osbuild-composer security update

An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for osbuild-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support, Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Update Services for SAP Solutions, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.6 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
osbuild-composer-46.3-4.el8_6.src.rpm
osbuild-composer-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-debugsource-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-dnf-json-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-tests-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
osbuild-composer-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-core-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-debugsource-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-dnf-json-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-tests-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
osbuild-composer-worker-debuginfo-46.3-4.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2025-58183: A flaw was found in the archive/tar package in the Go standard library. tar.Reader does not set a maximum size on the number of sparse region data blocks in GNU tar pax 1.0 sparse files. A specially crafted tar archive with a pax header indicating a big number of sparse regions can cause a Go program to try to allocate a large amount of memory, causing an out-of-memory condition and resulting in a denial of service.
